button.label: Open folder
button.supertip: Toggle the RBLclass task pane to search the folder tree and jump to a folder.

button.label: Classify
button.supertip: File the selected mail into one or more folders. Multi-select destinations; toggle keep-a-copy and remove-attachments.

button.label: Remove attachments
button.supertip: Strip all attachments from the selected mail(s), after confirmation.

button.label: Index status
button.supertip: Shows whether the folder index was loaded from cache or freshly walked, with store/folder counts. Step 1 diagnostic - the search UI arrives in Step 3.
